parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { user_id: $('Merge Upgrade Context').item.json.user_id, identity_key: $('Merge Upgrade Context').item.json.identity_key, is_authenticated: true, guest_identity_key: $('Merge Upgrade Context').item.json.guest_identity_key, auth_email: $('Merge Upgrade Context').item.json.auth_email, auth_provider: $('Merge Upgrade Context').item.json.auth_provider, upgraded_at: new Date().toISOString(), status: 'active', last_seen_at: new Date().toISOString(), locale: $('Merge Upgrade Context').item.json.locale, current_direction: $('Merge Upgrade Context').item.json.direction, source_page: $('Merge Upgrade Context').item.json.source_page } }}

={{ { session_id: $('Merge Upgrade Context').item.json.session_id, event_type: 'auth_upgrade', severity: 'info', payload_json: { user_id: $('Merge Upgrade Context').item.json.user_id, identity_key: $('Merge Upgrade Context').item.json.identity_key, guest_identity_key: $('Merge Upgrade Context').item.json.guest_identity_key, auth_email: $('Merge Upgrade Context').item.json.auth_email, auth_provider: $('Merge Upgrade Context').item.json.auth_provider, source_page: $('Merge Upgrade Context').item.json.source_page }, created_at: new Date().toISOString() } }}

parameters.url: ={{ $('Merge Upgrade Context').item.json.db_base_url + '/rest/v1/trial_messages?select=id,created_at&role=eq.user&identity_key=eq.' + encodeURIComponent($('Merge Upgrade Context').item.json.identity_key) + '&created_at=gte.' + encodeURIComponent(new Date(Date.now() - 24*60*60*1000).toISOString()) + '&order=created_at.asc&limit=20' }}

={{ $('Merge Upgrade Context').item.json.db_base_url + '/rest/v1/trial_tts_assets?select=id,created_at&identity_key=eq.' + encodeURIComponent($('Merge Upgrade Context').item.json.identity_key) + '&created_at=gte.' + encodeURIComponent(new Date(Date.now() - 24*60*60*1000).toISOString()) + '&order=created_at.asc&limit=20' }}
